title: HCL Technologies is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)

jsonLd.title: HCL Technologies is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
HCL Technologies has an exciting opening for a Full Stack Developer at our Bhopal office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About HCL Technologies:
HCL Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HCL Technologies!
